title: Campaign Monitor vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Campaign Monitor and AWeber. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs AWeber: Complete Comparison
intro: Campaign Monitor and AWeber are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different user bases. Campaign Monitor targets agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while AWeber focuses on simplicity for solopreneurs and bloggers. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right tool for your business needs.
choose_a_if: You manage multiple brands or clients and need multi-brand management
You want advanced journey designer and smart segmentation capabilities
You're looking for transactional email support alongside marketing emails
choose_b_if: You're starting out and want to test email marketing for free
You need RSS-to-email automation for blog distribution
You prefer simplicity and ease of use over advanced features

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than AWeber?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Campaign Monitor excels for agencies with its multi-brand management and advanced automation, earning it a slight edge overall. AWeber is better for beginners due to its free tier and simpler interface. Both have strong ratings, with AWeber scoring slightly higher on Trustpilot (4.0 vs 3.2).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber is cheaper overall because it offers a free tier for up to 500 subscribers, making it ideal for startups. Campaign Monitor starts at $11/month with no free option. However, once you outgrow AWeber's free plan, both platforms have competitive pricing in the $15-25/month range.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber list between platforms. Most email marketing tools support CSV export/import, allowing you to transfer your contacts and campaigns. However, you may need to recreate automation workflows, as each platform has different automation builders and features.
